questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '138c99b1-263e-4592-bf30-d73789cb71d7' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'eb3980e2-9e96-4dc8-8b5f-725fa78dd96c'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '138c99b1-263e-4592-bf30-d73789cb71d7'; delete from question_items where id = '138c99b1-263e-4592-bf30-d73789cb71d7';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
